title: Lemon's skyblock modpack
body:
# Lemon’s SkyBlock ModPack # 

This ModPack is made to give you a smooth and enjoyable Hypixel SkyBlock experience, with a mix of performance, QOL, and visual upgrades.

<details> <summary>Optimization Mods</summary>

- Sodium – major FPS boost by replacing Minecraft’s rendering engine
  
- Lithium – improves many game logic systems for better performance
  
- ImmediatelyFast – speeds up how rendering data is processed
  
- Entity Culling – skips rendering entities you can’t see

- BadOptimizations - Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering
  
- FerriteCore - Memory usage optimizations
  
</details> <details> <summary>SkyBlock QOL</summary>

- Skyblocker – adds tons of QOL improvements, Biggest QOL mod by far (Skytils 2.0 if you may)
  
- SkyHanni – Mainly Garden mod, other stuff also included
  
- Firmament – A QOL mod inspired by NEU (same developer)
  
- SkyblockAddons Unofficial - a continuation of SkyblockAddons, lots of QOL
  
</details> <details> <summary>SkyBlock Texture Packs</summary>

- FurfSky Reborn – custom textures for everything
  
- defrosted – simple, clean style pack
  
- SkyBlock Dark mode - changes blocks to be darker
  
</details> <details> <summary>General QOL Mods</summary>

- Cubes Without Borders – Borderless fullscreen support
  
- Debugify – Fixes known vanilla bugs
  
- Dynamic FPS – Lowers FPS when the game is unfocused or idle
  
- Zoomify – Simple zoom mod
  
- Chat Patches - Adds a lot of chat features
  
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright) - Gamma / Brightness / Night Vision mod
    
- Mod Menu - Adds a mod menu to view all of your mods (and change the configs to most)
  
- REI - An easy way to browse recipes,mob drops and more
  
- Tooltip Scroll - allows you to move/scroll tooltips

</details>


<details>
<summary>Other</summary>

- Low On Fire - Lower Fire (texture pack)
  
</details>


<details>
<summary>What About Skytils</summary>

- Currently in Alpha
  
- Half adds Essential which isnt that big of a problem, but they dont have that many features

once these problems will get fixed ill absolutely add them

</details>


<details>
<summary>Mods i presonally reccomend</summary>

- [Secret Routes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-routes-mod)- for better secret routes

</details>




All of these work together to create a smooth and enjoyable Hypixel SkyBlock experience.

**Everything uses default configs**, some overlap between mods may happen.



Based on the  "Skyblocker Modpack – Hypixel Skyblock"
